steps.name: source-collector-and-ranking
steps.summary: Added the pure topic source collector/ranking contract with source type roles, duplicate URL suppression, cache TTL, daily collection limit, scoring signals, and source_fetch usage event recording. Discovery/reaction sources remain excluded from claim support.

steps.name: research-pack-boundary
steps.summary: Added the pure research pack boundary with non-public pack records, post source records, source snapshots that reject full raw text, official/original claim support separation, and discovery-only strong-claim blocking.

steps.name: apply-to-me-context-ledger
steps.summary: Added the pure apply-to-me context ledger contract with public-safe personal_context_items, five article modes, generation input blocking for forbidden/private context, direct-experience ledger enforcement, and experiment evidence enforcement.

steps.name: claim-verification-source-policy
steps.summary: Added the pure claim verification source policy contract with article_claims and quality_gate_results fields, source/evidence requirements for factual claims, discovery/reaction source blocking, source contradiction failures, opinion separation, and short evidence quote storage.
